case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. LKHAGVAJAV LUVSANRAVDAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUVSANRAVDAN, LKHAGVAJAV HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-26-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LKHAGVAJAV LUVSANRAVDAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-13-2020 - APPEARANCES AT TRIAL CALL BY ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT INSTRUCTED COUNSEL TO PAY A TRIAL CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60 IN ROOM 103. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
